problems.group: 1. Jane mixed 2 parts of concentrated juice with 6 parts of water to make a total of 1840 ml of juice.
problems.display: How many millilitres of concentrate and how many millilitres of water were in the juice?

problems.group: 3. A mixture of salt and water weighs 1.2 kg. It contains 2% salt by weight, and the rest is water.
problems.display: How many grams of salt and how many grams of water are in the mixture?

problems.group: 4. A train travelled 264 kilometres from one town to the next at an average speed of 144 km/h. When did the train leave, if it arrived at 1440 hours (2:40 P.M.)?
